refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the operational context ensures clarity and testability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the agreed evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use link health monitoring and predictive failure detection algorithms.
DP3: Provide real-time link status reporting and alerting.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover logic
Reporting interfaces depend on link status data
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the sub-FRs with manageable coupling; monitoring and reporting can be modularized.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability.
Risk that failover timing may not meet availability targets.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating predictive failure detection (DP2) in future refinement to enhance robustness.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical network link hardware and embedded failover control logic within the vehicle system.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections managed by the Vehicle module for teleoperation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends link status and availability metrics to NGHE Solution for monitoring.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as link hardware and failover logic are physically and logically within Vehicle.
Some overlap in link management but primarily focused on control commands, not link hardware.
Minimal involvement, only receives alerts if link failure impacts safety.
Receives telemetry data but does not directly manage link redundancy.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Link availability functionality is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and ensure tight control over physical network components.
containment_risks: Potential for tight coupling with Vehicle control systems increasing complexity.
Risk that software updates in Vehicle module may impact link availability logic.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate modularization of failover logic to isolate from core Vehicle control to reduce risk.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant network links with failover) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and meets availability requirements.

diffusion_risks: Failover logic embedded in Vehicle may increase module complexity.
Telemetry interface dependency requires coordination with NGHE Solution.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor Vehicle module, supporting clear ownership and manageable diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Link availability can be verified via telemetry data and operational testing within Vehicle module boundaries.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link hardware and failover logic to Vehicle module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider future refinement to separate failover control software from core Vehicle control for maintainability.
Plan integration testing with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules for interface validation.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, incorporating predictive failure detection and modularizing failover logic would improve robustness and maintainability.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to stakeholders.

revise.why: To integrate predictive failure detection and improve failover logic modularity.

assumptions: Vehicle module can host failover control logic.
open_risks: Complexity of failover logic impacting Vehicle system stability.
Potential interface coordination issues with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Operational link availability data from prototype.
Verification test results for failover timing and effectiveness.
